```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-cap: Gamma distribution.
# Packages
library(ggplot2)

# Plot
ggplot2::ggplot(data.frame(x = c(0, 20)), aes(x)) +
  ggplot2::stat_function(
    fun = dgamma, args = list(shape = 2, rate = 0.5),
    aes(color = "α=2, β=0.5"),  linewidth = 1
  ) +
  ggplot2::stat_function(
    fun = dgamma, args = list(shape = 5, rate = 1),
    aes(color = "α=5, β=1"),  linewidth = 1
  ) +
  ggplot2::stat_function(
    fun = dgamma, args = list(shape = 10, rate = 2),
    aes(color = "α=10, β=2"),  linewidth = 1
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(color = "Parameters") +
  ggplot2::ylab("Density") +
  ggplot2::xlab("x") +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
